baseline guard-decision accuracy: 46.1%

  injected: 4/20
  normal: 40/40
  partial_failure: 12/12
  permission_loss: 2/12
  policy_conflict: 4/16
  provider_outage: 12/12
  rate_limit: 12/12
  stale_state: 0/12
